bookingSpamAccepted.title: Booking spam mitigation for v1
bookingSpamAccepted.description: You answered 'none'. Should we ship with no mitigation as an accepted risk, or add minimal honeypot/rate-limit first?

seoAccepted.description: You answered 'none'. Should route SEO be skipped as accepted risk, or should we at least wire the existing Seo component?

apiBaseUrlClarified.description: Same binary usually means this should be blank at build time so /api is same-origin. Confirm or override.

definitionOfBackendReadiness.title: Backend readiness meaning / what you want checked
definitionOfBackendReadiness.description: Examples: endpoints exist, DB migrations exist, build embeds SPA, submission creates records, direct refresh works. Add anything you care about.
